title: Rain Sensing Hands-Free Umbrella Bag
description: Automatic umbrella storage bag that deploys/retracts via servo mechanism triggered by a resistive rain sensor module and Arduino Uno, providing hands-free rain protection.
objective: Deploy umbrella in < 2 s of rain detection; retract automatically 10 s after rain stops; false-trigger immunity via 200 ms debounce.
constraints: 5 V USB power; YL-83 rain sensor; SG90 servo; BOM < ₹500; wearable backpack integration.
supporting_fact_titles: Rain Sensor — Resistive / Capacitive Detection Module
design_element_titles: Rain Sensor + Servo Umbrella Deployment Module

element_usage_notes.Rain Sensor + Servo Umbrella Deployment: YL-83 + LM393 digital output; Arduino 200 ms debounce; SG90 180° deployment.
element_usage_notes.RC Servo Joint Actuator: SG90 pulls deployment cord 180° to extend umbrella; reverse to retract.
